candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; lower priority than the primary revenue label.

variables.notes: Both labels appear to represent the same top-line amount; ordered with the cleaner primary label first.

candidates.why: Candidate list entry, but this is a balance sheet inventory asset row, not an income statement cost/expense line.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses a valid income statement cost line. No explicit 'Cost of sales'/'Cost of services' row is shown. For this service-heavy business, 'Employee costs' is the most plausible direct operating cost, but it may include overhead as well, so manual review is needed. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Employee costs

candidates.why: Large operating expense component, but may represent direct service labor rather than SG&A overhead for this issuer.
Best available overhead bucket on the income statement; not a total/subtotal and consistent with SG&A-type costs.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Amortization should be excluded from SG&A components per instructions.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row is present. Selected the best non-total overhead bucket and excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, and headcount/statistical rows. 'Employee costs' was not included because it is more likely direct service labor and was used as the tentative COGS proxy.
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible on the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Single comprehensive finance cost line; broader than pure interest expense but best single reported line if total interest is not separately reported in one line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on loans and borrowings
candidates.why: Pure interest expense line, but excludes factoring and lease interest and therefore may understate total interest cost if used alone.
Interest-related but only a component of total interest expense.
Interest-related but only a component of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure duplicating lease-liability interest concept, lower priority.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on loans and borrowings

variables.notes: Prioritized the single reported finance-cost line because individual interest rows are partial components and later code selects the first non-missing value rather than summing.

candidates.row_label: Share of result from equity-accounted investees
candidates.why: Income statement line, not equity/book equity.

candidates.row_label: Hyperinflation restatement of equity at 1 January
candidates.why: OCI/equity adjustment, not the equity balance.
Asset line, not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of ISS A/S

Total equity includes non-controlling interests, so lower priority for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of ISS A/S

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB. Included 'Total Equity' only as lower-priority fallback.

Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
